data.body:
[‘Secret Midnight Party’ Update Celebration – Special On-Time Gift!]

Sensei, did you enjoy the thrilling(?) party held in the middle of the night?
To commemorate the Secret Midnight Party, a special on-time gift has been prepared just for you!

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2946610
